title: S&R Items Delivered by Type
query: SELECT SUM(Count) AS total FROM SearchAndRescue WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT COALESCE(Name_Localised, Name) AS label, SUM(Count) AS value FROM SearchAndRescue WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY Name ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {total} S&R item(s) delivered to rescue megaships during the report period. The mix of recovered items tells the story of the disaster you were responding to — escape pods mean survivors still waiting; black boxes mean catastrophe investigation; occupied cryopods are the most haunting and most valuable commodity in any rescue scenario.
details.help: SearchAndRescue Name_Localised is the commodity type. total drives the title as the delivery volume.

tagLines: Search and rescue item delivery log compiled. Recovery commodity breakdown noted in the humanitarian record.
Escape pods mean people. Black boxes mean answers. You brought back both.
Every item type is a chapter of someone else's disaster. You gathered the evidence and delivered it.
